posts.author: John_S (John Gottschalk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m considering using Monday in our organisation for cross-project, cross-departmental management, with eagle view, waterfall, kanban sprints, & resource management.

One thing I’m really missing is black-out dates, specific dates when you can’t work, and automatically get removed from your calculations.

I’ve seen Bradley has responded a few times -(Dec 2019), (Apr 2020)- that it was in some backlog of wanted features. So I figured I’d make a specific ticket for it here. So, is the feature implemented, in production or still in backlog?

This is my current temporary solution:

image1314×330 35.7 KB

image1110×374 20.1 KB
